description_long: This is a modern residential house set within a fenced lot, featuring a main building with clean, geometric lines and a flat roof. The property includes a spacious backyard with a large swimming pool, a covered patio area, and landscaped green spaces with several trees and shrubs. The house has multiple stories, with large windows and a rooftop terrace visible from several angles. The front of the property faces a street lined with parked cars and a sidewalk bordered by evenly spaced trees. The exterior is primarily finished in light-colored materials, with some darker accents and a mix of hardscaping and soft landscaping. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living, privacy, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious yard featuring a pool and landscaped greenery. The property is enclosed by a fence and faces a tree-lined urban street.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angled aerial perspective, highlighting the pool, patio, and the main building's geometric layout, as well as the fenced perimeter and street frontage.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the street side, emphasizing the entryway, driveway, and the arrangement of trees along the sidewalk.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a rear-side perspective, focusing on the backyard, pool, and the relationship between the house and the outdoor living spaces.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a direct view of the backyard, showcasing the pool, patio, and the rear facade of the house with its large windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door design with adjacent landscaping and a driveway.
